narrative:
Newark 4-A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,442 registered voters, with 63.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.0%, a modest Republican lean of 4.6 percentage points.
